title: 10 health benefits of Cymbopogon nardus (citronella)
intro: Cymbopogon nardus has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. These medicinal properties can help alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis, wound infections, and fungal skin infections. By using citronella oil or consuming citronella tea, individuals can experience relief from pain and discomfort, improved wound healing, and reduced risk of infection. This natural remedy can greatly improve the quality of life for those suffering from chronic illnesses, allowing them to engage in daily activities with greater ease and confidence.
